zh.Old Fold, South Mymms, Middlesex, Englan: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Frowyk於大約1230年出生在英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯時，他的父親Laurence de Frowick31歲，母親Alice de Frowick27歲。他於1259年與Isabella Durham在英國英格蘭米德萊可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年5月19日在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Frowyk was born about 1230, in South Mymms, Middlesex, England, his father, Laurence de Frowick, was 31 and his mother, Alice de Frowick, was 27. He married Isabella Durham in 1259, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 19 May 1286, in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Frowyk est né environ 1230, à South Mymms, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Laurence de Frowick, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice de Frowick, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Durham en 1259, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1286, à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.Church Grey Friars, London, England: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Frowyk um 1230 in South Mymms, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Laurence de Frowick 31 und seine Mutter Alice de Frowick 27. Er hat 1259 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Isabella Durham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1286 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Frowyk è nato il circa 1230 nel South Mymms, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Laurence de Frowick, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Frowick, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Durham nel 1259, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 19 maggio 1286, nel Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Frowykが約1230年にイギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズで生まれた時，父Laurence de Frowickは31歳，母Alice de Frowickは27歳であった。1259年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスでIsabella Durhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1286年5月19日にイギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトで57歳で死去した。

ko.Church Grey Friars, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Frowyk(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 미들레세스 소우스 마이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Laurence de Frowick(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Frowick(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 Isabella Durham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Frowyk nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Laurence de Frowick, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Frowick, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Durham em 1259, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1286, em Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.Church Grey Friars, London, England: краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Frowyk родился около 1230 г. в местности соут миммс, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Laurence de Frowick было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Frowick, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Durham в 1259 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 19 мая 1286 г. в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Isabella Durham en 1259, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1286, en Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
